title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Footprint

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Reliance Footprint
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint:
Reliance Footprint is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
